---
title: "TCGA-HNSC DESeq2 — HPV+ vs HPV-"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# DESeq2 differential expression between HPV+ and HPV- tumours
# on the full TCGA-HNSC cohort. Inputs: count matrix + harmonised
# metadata under TCGA_TX_DATA. Outputs: DEG tables under TCGA_TX_OUT.
source(here::here("config.R"))
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


# 1. Aim

## Generating Count files for all 487 samples of TCGA with HPV status


# 2. Loading packages 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE, results='hide'}
library(DESeq2)
library(ashr) #in order to shrink logFC if we use contrasts instead of coefficients to retrieve results
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)
library(pheatmap)
library(tibble)
library(dplyr)
```


# 3. Making input files ready for deseq2, start with whole comparison

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE, results='hide'}
Matrix = read.csv(file.path(TCGA_TX_DATA, "Countsprimarytumormodified.csv"))
colnames(Matrix)[1] <- "Genes"
attach(Matrix)
#if we target the mean of counts
#Matrix = aggregate(Matrix,FUN = mean,by=list(Matrix$Genes))

#if we a trget max of counts
Matrix = aggregate(Matrix,FUN = max,by=list(Matrix$Genes))
Matrix <- Matrix[,-1]

#write.csv(Matrix, "Maxcountall_TCGA.csv")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE, results='hide'}
#setting the row names (genes) for each samples

HNSCC_matrix = Matrix[,-1]
rownames(HNSCC_matrix) = Matrix[,1]

#input of the metadata
Metadata = read.csv(file.path(TCGA_TX_DATA, "TCGA_metadata_GDC_RPB_combined.csv"))
rownames(Metadata) <- Metadata[,1]
Metadata = subset(Metadata, select = -1 )
```

#filtration fo metadata according to HPV subtype
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE, results='hide'}
#removing rows without HPV status

Metadata <- Metadata %>%
  filter(!is.na(Subtype))

# Find common row names in Metadata and column names in HNSCC_matrix
common_names <- intersect(rownames(Metadata), colnames(HNSCC_matrix))

# Subset Metadata to include only the common row names
Metadata <- Metadata[common_names, ]
HNSCC_matrix <- HNSCC_matrix[,common_names]
# Replace 'HNSC_HPV-' with 'HPV_Negative'
Metadata$Subtype <- gsub("HNSC_HPV-", "HPV_Negative", Metadata$Subtype)


# Replace 'HNSC_HPV+' with 'HPV_Positive', here i need to use 3rd bracket for + otherwise the + remains, stupid.
Metadata$Subtype <- gsub("HNSC_HPV[+]", "HPV_Positive", Metadata$Subtype)

# Order Metadata according to the order of common_names as they appear in HNSCC_matrix
Metadata <- Metadata[common_names[order(match(common_names, colnames(HNSCC_matrix)))], ]

#if the row names of metadata is in same seq as column of matrix
all(rownames(Metadata) == colnames(HNSCC_matrix))


```

# Create DESeq object
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE, results='hide'}
dds_wt <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = round(HNSCC_matrix),
                                 colData = Metadata,
                                 design = ~ Subtype)
```


#keeping genes with count values >= 10
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE, results='hide'}
keep <- rowSums(counts(dds_wt)) >= 10
dds_wt <- dds_wt[keep,]
#Count normalization---> calculation
dds_wt <- estimateSizeFactors(dds_wt)
sizeFactors(dds_wt)

#Count normalization---> extraction
normalized_wt_counts <- counts(dds_wt, normalized=TRUE)
#write.csv(normalized_wt_counts,'HPV_all_normalized.csv')

```




# Run analysis for fold change of 3
```{r echo=TRUE}
dds_wt <- DESeq(dds_wt)

wt_res <- results(dds_wt,
                  contrast = c("Subtype", "HPV_Positive",
                               "HPV_Negative"),
                  alpha = 0.05,
                  lfcThreshold = 1.58)
wt_res

result = data.frame(wt_res)



# Create a new column 'gene_symbol' with row names (gene names)
  result$gene_symbol <- rownames(result)
  # Optionally, if you want 'gene_symbol' to be the first column
  result <- result[, c("gene_symbol", setdiff(names(result), "gene_symbol"))]

write.csv(result, file = file.path(TCGA_TX_OUT, 'deg_HPVneg_vs_HPVpos_lfcchange3.csv'), row.names = FALSE)

##get only the significant values
padj <- result$padj
any(padj <0.05)
result %>%
  arrange(padj)
filtered_padj <- filter(result,padj<0.05)

write.csv(filtered_padj, file.path(TCGA_TX_OUT, "significant_degs_allsamples_HPVneg_vs_HPVpos_lfc3change.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
dim(filtered_padj)
```

# Run analysis for fold change of 1.5
```{r echo=TRUE}
dds_wt <- DESeq(dds_wt)

wt_res <- results(dds_wt,
                  contrast = c("Subtype", "HPV_Positive",
                               "HPV_Negative"),
                  alpha = 0.05,
                  lfcThreshold = 0.585)
wt_res

result = data.frame(wt_res)



# Create a new column 'gene_symbol' with row names (gene names)
  result$gene_symbol <- rownames(result)
  # Optionally, if you want 'gene_symbol' to be the first column
  result <- result[, c("gene_symbol", setdiff(names(result), "gene_symbol"))]

write.csv(result, file = file.path(TCGA_TX_OUT, 'deg_HPVneg_vs_HPVpos_fcchange1.5.csv'), row.names = FALSE)

##get only the significant values
padj <- result$padj
any(padj <0.05)
result %>%
  arrange(padj)
filtered_padj <- filter(result,padj<0.05)

write.csv(filtered_padj, file.path(TCGA_TX_OUT, "significant_degs_allsamples_HPVneg_vs_HPVpos_fc1.5change.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
dim(filtered_padj)
```
